data.title: worktree sub-agent branch not accessible via git fetch origin after isolation commit
data.description: After a sub-agent completes work in an isolation worktree (isolation: worktree) and commits to its branch (e.g. worktree-agent-afacc1cd), the orchestrator cannot merge the results via 'git fetch origin <branch> && git merge'. The command fails with exit code 128 because the worktree branch is local to the agent's working directory and was never pushed to the remote. The per-worktree-review-commit workflow assumes the branch is fetchable from origin, but worktree isolation creates local-only branches. Workaround: use direct git operations against the worktree path rather than fetch+merge.
